title: andropogon saccharoides var. genuinus
intro: Andropogon saccharoides var. genuinus, also known as Switchgrass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It is a popular medicinal plant used to treat various ailments due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant's medicinal properties include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues, offering several health benefits such as improved immune function, reduced inflammation, and enhanced wound healing. In herbal preparations, Switchgrass is often used as a tea or tincture, and its dried roots and leaves can also be added to salves and ointments for topical application.
